function.name: move_robot
function.description: Move the robot to a named point of interest.

location_name.description: A key referring to a location inside locations.json

function.name: unscrew_fastener
function.description: Remove or tighten a specified fastener.

function.name: grip_part
function.description: Grip a specified part using a chosen mode.

function.name: place_part
function.description: Place a part into a defined location.

function.name: inspect_with_camera
function.description: Inspect a target with the robot camera.

function.name: request_human_assistance
function.description: Ask the human operator to perform a manual task.

function.name: detect_screws
function.description: Detect screws in the workspace or on a specified component using perception sensors.

component_id.description: Optional component identifier to limit screw detection to a specific part.

region.description: Optional workspace region identifier (e.g., top_cover, battery_pack).

function.name: emergency_stop
function.description: Immediately stop all robot motion and place the system in a safe state.

reason.description: Optional explanation for why the emergency stop was triggered.

function.name: go_to_next_task
function.description: Advance execution to the next task in the current disassembly plan.

task_id.description: Optional specific task identifier to move to. If omitted, the next sequential task is selected.

function.name: stop_motion
function.description: Stop the current robot motion without triggering an emergency stop.

function.name: resume_motion
function.description: Resume robot motion after a stop if the system state allows.

from_state.description: Optional state from which motion is resumed.

function.name: stop_timer
function.description: Stop a general-purpose timer and store elapsed time.
